calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment (Ccp 437(B))
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PRADO GOMEZ' Motion To Vacate Default Judgment (C.C.P. 437(b).
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, LEAVE TO FILE ANSWER GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order & Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff M.Snow's Motion for Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order and Turnovoer Order. Motion granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall prepare and submit proposed order. COMM: PAUL SLAVIT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Carpenter.
Deborah Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: M. Snow, ind. as Assignee.
Plaintiff's Witness: Otis Logan, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Prado Gomez, ind. dba. Proyecto Contrasida Por Vida aka Contrasida Projuect for Life as follows:
Damages $12,199.79
Prejudgment Interest $456.30
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Treble Damages $24,399.58
Costs $395.00, for a total of $38,110.67
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Continued To Jun-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
